name: VoidArch Context
description: Local-first, agent-neutral repository memory, query, and context-pack engine.
keyFeatures: File and document retrieval with BM25
architecture: Repository files, docs, graph nodes, vectors, and memories are fused into a bounded context pack for any coding agent.
fileStructure: CLI commands for init, ingest, search, graph, memory, embed, context, doctor, and serve
details: Runs locally without Docker or Python. The embedded database is single-process and vector retrieval requires an explicit embedding pass.

name: VoidArch Studio
description: Active-development local orchestration control room built on VoidArch Context.
keyFeatures: Daemon-owned Claude, Codex, and shell PTYs
Local web dashboard and thin Tauri shell
architecture: A local dashboard and desktop shell communicate with a daemon that owns sessions, worktrees, runs, hooks, and Context access.
details: In active development; not presented as a released hosted service.

name: AgentSec Suite
description: Integrated agent-security suite combining four web modules and a local tool-call hook.
keyFeatures: Claude Code and Codex PreToolUse hook
architecture: Prompt, manifest, and agent metadata checks feed allow, block, or review decisions, with approval and audit handling plus local hook enforcement.
fileStructure: Public component repositories: PromptShield, agentsec-hook-pack, mcpguard-lite, agentmap, approveops
details: Live integrated demo: https://promptshield-cyan.vercel.app. Component repositories are supporting modules rather than separate portfolio products.

name: saas-core
description: Private modular Next.js product scaffold and factory infrastructure.
architecture: Presets and modules are planned and validated before templates are rendered into a bounded product scaffold and checked in CI.
details: Private supporting infrastructure. No public repository or live-demo claim.

name: About David Papp
description: AI Solutions Developer at WEBINFORM IT Ltd since October 2024 and BSc Artificial Intelligence student at VU Amsterdam, based in the Rotterdam area with NL/EU work authorization.
keyFeatures: Production LLM and ERP-integrated systems at WEBINFORM
Inherited AI-first service recovery with roughly 40% API-cost reduction
Client discovery, solution design, coordination, proposals, and pricing
architecture: Professional AI delivery, university study, and selected personal engineering systems.
details: Contact: contact@davidpapp.dev. Full-time availability; no sponsorship required.
